creator: rpokala@panasas.com
text:
At the very least, hw.mps.enable_ssu should be documented in mps(4).

There's probably also an argument that the default value of MPS_SSU_ENABLE_SSD_DISABLE_HDD should be changed to MPS_SSU_ENABLE_SSD_ENABLE_HDD. With 512e and SMR, nowadays even HDDs appreciate a chance to quiesce up before they're powered down.
